summary.releaseOutputTraceability: every release artifact traces to source hash + builder atom + commit sha

builders.capability: Compiles each workspace package's src/** to dist/** using tsc
Assembles a drop-in bundle that downstream repos can copy into their root
Bundles all packages into a single onefile atm.mjs for self-contained distribution

releaseParityGate.principle: Release artifacts must be reproducible from the source-tree-sha they declare; release parity validator hashes outputs and compares against expected.
releaseParityGate.dogfoodScoreIntegration: release-parity adds to atom_with_rollback_evidence weighted component (currently 0%, target 70% pass / 50% fail)
releaseParityGate.remediationPath: TASK-ASA-0016 final graduation will run full release pipeline and capture rollback evidence for each builder atom
releaseParityGate.currentState: validators (root-drop-release, onefile-release) pass; parity ratchet not yet wired into dogfood-score

exclusionGuarantee.principle: Release output paths (release/**, dist/**, build/**) are explicitly excluded from production source debt calculation.
enforcedBy: exclusion-inventory.json entries for dist/**, build/**, release/**
exclusionGuarantee.verifiedCount: 0 release files currently counted as production debt

rollbackPlan.approach: Builders are pure functions of source. Reverting a builder script + rebuilding restores prior release output.
rollbackPlan.verifyAfterRollback: rerun npm run build && npm run validate:root-drop-release && npm run validate:onefile-release
